items.title: BlockVid-2: Co-Design of Sparse Attention and KV Management for Video World Models
items.description: Designed a hybrid sparse attention mechanism (HSA) with linear global attention and dynamic execution strategy. The system achieves 5.67x faster inference while preserving key context and SOTA generation quality.

items.title: InternVL2.5 Migration to Mind-Speed for Huawei ICT Finals
items.description: Ported a multimodal foundation model to Mind-Speed and optimized training through model partitioning, parallel execution, and operator fusion. The resulting pipeline achieved about 1.15x training acceleration and helped the team win first place.

items.imageAlt: AI model engineering project image placeholder
items.title: Smart Contract Review and Verification Module at Nodesk AI
items.description: Trained and refined an audit model through cleaning and annotating domain data, improving accuracy by 15%. Also contributed as the second inventor in related patent drafting with reranking and context-aware mechanisms.

items.title: Xlab Operations and Infrastructure Maintenance
items.description: Managed daily cluster operations and account permissions. Built isolated development environments with Docker for multiple research projects and deployed an internal Overleaf platform while maintaining the official website.
